task: Decide whether to start anticoagulation in a 72-year-old patient with new-onset atrial fibrillation.

steps.observation: Patient reports palpitations x 3 days. ECG: AF, ventricular rate 96 bpm.
steps.reasoning: Need CHA2DS2-VASc components and bleeding-risk inputs before deciding.
steps.why: These six fields determine CHA2DS2-VASc; without them the next step is a guess.
steps.what_not: Do NOT estimate from patient self-report — the EHR is the authoritative source.

steps.observation: CHA2DS2-VASc computed: 4 (age 65-74 = 1, F = 1, HTN = 1, vascular disease = 1).
steps.reasoning: Score >= 2 supports anticoagulation; now check renal function and bleeding screen.
steps.why: eGFR 42 forces a dose reduction for apixaban; INR/Hgb screen for occult bleeding.
steps.what_not: Do not pick a fixed apixaban dose without eGFR — wrong-dose harm is the most common error.

final_answer: Start apixaban 2.5 mg BID (reduced dose: meets the creatinine >= 1.5 / eGFR < 50 criterion).

task: Customer asks whether order #SO-44823 can ship today; agent must decide and reply.

steps.observation: Customer message: 'Can SO-44823 ship today?' Order references material MAT-9912 x 50 units, plant DE10.
steps.reasoning: Need current stock at plant DE10 and any open reservations against MAT-9912 before promising a date.
steps.why: On-hand alone is misleading: MM reservations can already be earmarked for other orders.
steps.what_not: Do not quote on_hand to the customer — quote available (on_hand minus reservations).

steps.observation: Available stock 26 < requested 50; confirm replenishment ETA before declining.
steps.reasoning: Check open purchase orders for MAT-9912 at plant DE10 with goods-receipt date <= today.
steps.why: If the GR posts tomorrow, today-shipment is impossible regardless of customer urgency.
steps.what_not: Do not promise partial shipment without checking the customer's split-delivery flag in the sales order.

steps.observation: Open PO arrives 2026-04-29; partial-delivery allowed flag on SO-44823 is FALSE.
steps.reasoning: Cannot ship today, cannot split. Earliest full-shipment date = 2026-04-29 + 1 day handling.
steps.why: Decision is now fully grounded in three SAP facts; no further tool call needed.
steps.what_not: Do not silently change the requested delivery date in VBAK — propose it back to the customer first.

final_answer: Order SO-44823 cannot ship today (26 EA available vs 50 requested, partial delivery not allowed). Earliest full-shipment date is 2026-04-30, pending PO 4500021187 receipt on 2026-04-29.
